calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Goal-stream heartbeat diagnostic after config/harness seam fixes
items.note: Diagnostic only; claim_ids empty and manifest evidence_direction non_contributory. Classifies goal-stream arms as zero_stream / partial_stream_write_only / live_read_side / live_action_side after 2026-05-13 fixes: from_dims goal_weight -> E3Config.goal_weight and StepHarness benefit_exposure from body_state[11]. Dry-run PASS: full MECH-307 arm produced wanting+liking writes, z_goal_norm_peak > 0, bridge cue fires, and conjunction fires.
